titleStmt.title: SII 17.297: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 297. (A.R. No. 269 of 1904.) YŌGIMALLAVARAM, PUTTUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Parāśarēśvara temple.

This inscription is dated in the month of Tai of the 9th year of Rājarāja III. It refers to an endowment made on the 80th day of the 23rd year of Rājarāja I. It also mentions Śāḷukki Vīra Nārasiṅgadēva alias Yādavarāya, as the ruler of the place (vide Nos. 296 above and 299 below).

This records an enquiry conducted by the aforesaid Yādavarāya, the Śrīmāhēśvaras and the Sthānattār, held in Tirukkaṇṇappadēvan-tirukkāvaṇam, into a complaint made by the sthānattār of the temple of god Pippalādīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva in Tiruchchukaṉūr, a brahmadēya in Tirukkuḍavūr-nāḍu in Perumbāṇappāḍi-ttiruvēṅgaḍa-kkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, against the sabhā of the same place that the latter failed to carry out the provisions of an endowment of 26 1/4 kaḻañju for services and offerings during Uttarāyaṉa Saṁkramaṇa to God Pippalādīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva, made by Namban Kūttāḍi alias Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-Brahmārāyaṉ of Aruvētōvai kōṭ(?), a brahmadēya in Nenmali-nāḍu in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam on the 80th day of the 23rd regnal year of Rājarāja I, having received the amount of the endowment from the donor. As the complainants could produce in evidence an epigraphical record of this transaction, the Sabhā was directed to pay the 26 1/4 kaḻañju into the temple treasury.
The ūravar of Iḷamaṇḍiyam, Eṟppiḍipaṭṭu, Avilāli, Guṇḍuppākkam, Tēṉappaḷḷi-Muññaippūṇḍi, Taṇḍalam, etc., figure as signatories to this inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkara
vattikaḷ rājarājadevaṟku
yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu taim māsa
m ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalat
tup perumpāṇappāṭit tiruveṅkaṭakkoṭṭa
ttut tirukkuṭavūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyan tiru
ccukaṉūr pippalādeśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar
koyiṟ tāṉattār Ivvūril sabhaiyār perile Innāyiṉāṟku U
ttarāyaṉam saṅkramattukku Ubhayañ celuttuvatākap paḻaṅkalve
ṭṭukkaṇṭapaṭi śrīmaṟkitti muṉṉuṭaittāka śrīkovi[ rājakecari panma]
rāṉa śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 23āvatu nāḷ Eṇpatil co
ḻamaṇṭalattu Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu nenmalināṭṭu brahmade
yam Aruvetovaikoṭa nampan kūttāṭiyāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻa brahmārāyaṉ pakkal tanma kaṭṭaḷaikkallālt tuḷai
niṟai koṇṭa poṉ 2 10 6 pae Ippoṉ Irupattu Aṟu kaḻañcekālu
kkum Uttarāyaṉasaṅkraman toṟun tirumañcaṉattukku Amutu
paṭi yuḷḷiṭṭa sarvvopakaraṇaṅkaḷukkum poṉ kaḻañce mañcā
ṭiyum puṭavai Eḻum Arumoḻitevaṉāl nellu mukkalamum pa
tteṭṭukkuttaluṭpaṭa Arici Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻiyu
m ney Eḻu nāḻiyum pāl nānāḻiyum tayir patakkum ten nānāḻi
yum Eḷḷu Irunāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu nālum puḷiṅkaṟiyamutukkup puḷi I
rupalamum mañcaḷ Aṟupatiṉ palamuñ citāri Irupalamuñ cantaṉa
mirupalavaraiyu miḷanīr Eṭṭuñ caṟkarai patiṉpalamum paruppu
nāḻiyum pākku nūṟṟeḻupattañcum veṟṟilaikkaṭṭu Eṭṭum U
ppu Irunāḻiyum miḷaku nāḻiyu
ṅ kalacam nūṟṟeṭṭum pāli
kai
yum Ikkalveṭṭuppaṭi
Ivvūril sabhaiyār ce
lutta veṇumeṉṟu I
ṉnaraṭuṭaiya cāḷukki viranāraci
[ṅkadevarā] ṉa yātavarāyaṟkun tirukka
ṇṇappatevan tirukkāvaṇattil cimā
heśvaraṟkum tāṉattāṟku mip pippalā
deśvaramuṭaiyār koyiṟ tānattā raṟivitta Iṭattu tirumalai
yiṟ tāṉattāraiyum tiruccukanūr sabhaiyāraiyum keḻkka
It tirukkaṇṇappatevan tirukkāvaṇattile kūppiṭṭuc colla
kalveṭṭuppaṭi celutta veṇṭāvo Eṉṟu keṭka nāṅka ḷinta
Ubhayam Aṟiyo meṉkiṉilik kalveṭṭuppaṭi cella
veṇumeṉṟu cimākecurar collukaiyil Iccapaiyār pa
kkali likkalveṭṭuppaṭikkut tantu koṇṭakkuṭiñe Eṭai
cempoṉ 2 10 6pa7 Ippoṉ Irupattaṟu kaḻañce kālum
kaikkoṇṭu Ippippalādeśvaramuṭaiyār koyilile
cipaṇṭārattile Oṭukki Issabhaiyār peril Upaiyan tavir
ttu Ippippalādīśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar koyililt tirumalaiyi
le kalveṭṭit tiriviṭṭuk kuṭuttom tirukkaṇṇappa tevan tirukkāvaṇa
ttilc cimākecurarum Ippippalāticuramuṭaiyār koyililt tāṉattārum
Ippaṭi tantu kalveṭṭit tiriviṭṭuk kuṭuttapaṭikku Aṟivom Innāṭ
ṭiḷamaṇṭiyattu Ūravarum pāṭi Ūravarum perur Ūravarum Eṟppiṭipaṭṭu Ūravaṟā
m noṭṭapāṭi Ūravarum Avilāli Ūravarum kuṇṭuppākkattu Ūravarum teṉappaḷ
ḷi Ūravarum muññaippūṇṭi Ūravarun taṇṭalattu Ūravarum Ivvaṉaivo
m I Ippaṭi In ne ka coḻa luttumpaṭikku veṭṭiṉa
Digital edition of SII 17.297 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
